news.headline: AE Industrial Partners appoints Jennifer Lowe as Global Head of Government Relations in Washington D.C; specializes in National Security, Aerospace, and Industrial Services.
news.summary: In Boca Raton, Florida, AE Industrial Partners has appointed Jennifer Lowe as the Global Head of Government Relations. Lowe will oversee government relations and public policy from the firm's Washington D.C. office. AE Industrial is a private equity firm that focuses on National Security, Aerospace, and Industrial Services. This announcement comes after multiple revisions, with Lowe set to lead the firm in this crucial role.

news.headline: Learn to select successful crypto gaming tokens this bull run: Web3 Gamer shares tips for identifying winners and becoming a gaming influencer.
news.summary: When choosing crypto gaming tokens for potential long-term success, there is a straightforward guideline to follow. Additionally, learn about the steps to becoming a gaming influencer or coach.

news.headline: Starbird expands to Washington, Mehta Investment Group to open 17 locations, including first in 2025. Brand's growth continues.
news.summary: Mehta Investment Group has revealed plans to launch 17 new locations across the country, with the first set to open in 2025. This expansion marks a significant step in the brand's growth strategy. Starbird, known as a pioneer in the super-premium fast food sector, shared details about its second franchise development. The new locations are anticipated to boost the brand's presence nationwide.

news.headline: Penelope Bourbon launches Havana, their annual cask-finished bourbon with tropical and maple notes. St. Louis, Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: Penelope Bourbon recently unveiled its newest addition to the Cooper Series with an annual release that promises an exceptional bourbon experience. This unique cask-finished bourbon expertly combines tropical flavors with decadent maple notes. The launch took place in St. Louis on December 10, 2024. This release is set to delight bourbon enthusiasts with its luxurious flavor profile, showcasing Penelope Bourbon's commitment to innovation in the bourbon industry.

news.headline: Orangetheory Fitness launches new brand campaign "Every Reason is the Right Reason" celebrating diverse motivations.
news.summary: Orangetheory Fitness, the top global group fitness leader, has unveiled "Every Reason is the Right Reason" as their inaugural motto in a revamped branding effort. This announcement comes as part of an energized rebranding initiative by the company. The event took place on December 10, 2024, in Boca Raton, Florida. Known for its cutting-edge approach to group fitness which integrates science-backed methodologies with technology for enhanced tracking, Orangetheory Fitness continues to position itself at the forefront of the industry.

news.headline: Kennesaw State University to launch first rural management MBA in Fall 2025. Program aims to empower rural communities.
news.summary: Kennesaw State University in Georgia has announced the introduction of a Rural Management concentration within its Evening Master of Business Administration program, set to commence in Fall 2025. This program marks the first of its kind in the United States and aims to provide specialized education tailored for rural management.

news.headline: Kaizen Analytix experiences exceptional growth, appoints Bill Kotrba as Associate Partner. ATLANTA, Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: Kaizen Analytix LLC has achieved remarkable success this year, witnessing unprecedented growth and a significant leadership addition. On December 10, 2024, the company revealed that Bill Kotrba has been appointed as an Associate Partner. Kaizen Analytix is known for its top-notch technology, artificial intelligence, and data analytics solutions. This year has proven to be a record-breaker for the company, reflecting its commitment to excellence in the industry.

news.headline: Isosorbide market expected to reach US$ 65.7 Mn by 2034 with 8.2% CAGR, driven by bio-polymers in diverse sectors. Major players include Cargill Inc. and regulatory support from governments. In pharmaceuticals, Isosorbide is used for cardiovascular treatments. Technological innovations and advancements enhance production efficiency.
news.summary: The Isosorbide market was valued at US$ 27.9 million in 2023 and is projected to reach US$ 65.7 million by 2034 with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.2%. Isosorbide, a sustainable organic compound derived from sources like corn and wheat, plays a vital role in various industries due to its thermal stability, chemical resistance, and biodegradability. Key players in the market include Cargill Inc., Roquette Frères, and Mitsubishi Chemical Group. The demand for bio-polymers like polyethylene isosorbide terephthalate (PEIT) in packaging and automotive sectors is driving market growth. Technological advancements in production processes and expanding pharmaceutical applications, especially in cardiovascular treatments, further contribute to market expansion. Regulatory support for bio-based materials is also fueling the growth of isosorbide in industries like plastics and coatings.

news.headline: Malibu wildfire size triples, thousands forced to evacuate due to escalating situation.
Meme coins like Dogecoin, Shiba Inu, and Bonk struggle as Bitcoin rebounds. Liquidations spike, leaving them in the red.
news.summary: As Bitcoin experienced a sharp decline on Monday, meme coins suffered significant losses, leading to a surge in liquidations. Dogecoin and other similar coins continued to be in the red amid the market turmoil.

news.headline: Riksbank certificates set to mature over 5/10/15 years, with varying interest rates up to 3%.
Bright MLS November 2024: Home sales in November up 5.7% year-over-year with a third consecutive increase.
news.summary: Active buyers are showing interest in the market despite the high mortgage rates and home prices. In November, the Bright MLS service area witnessed a 5.7% increase in home sales compared to the same month last year. This marks the third consecutive month of year-over-year sales growth. Year-to-date sales are on a steady incline...

news.headline: Hyland launches AI-powered Hyland Insight for content curation & automation. Also releases Hyland for Workday and RPA advancements.
news.summary: Hyland, a pioneer in content innovation cloud technology, announced new enhancements including Insight, which allows for advanced content curation, knowledge discovery, and automation. The recent product releases also include Hyland for Workday, as well as improvements in attended Robotic Process Automation (RPA). The updates were disclosed in Cleveland on December 10, 2024.

news.headline: Labatt Breweries buys 10 Volvo VNR Electric trucks, largest order in Canada, for sustainable transportation.
news.summary: In Greensboro, North Carolina, on December 10, 2024, Labatt Breweries of Canada, a prominent beverage company, has incorporated ten Volvo VNR Electric trucks into its fleet, a noteworthy advancement in eco-friendly transportation. This move signifies a critical step towards sustainability for Labatt as they utilize these trucks to transport their beverages from distribution centers in Montreal and Bois-des-Filion to customers in Montreal and its northern shoreline.

news.headline: Roadzen's National Automobile Club partners with Motive for affordable emergency roadside services for customers.
news.summary: A recent collaboration has been announced to provide emergency roadside assistance and towing services to all Motive customers at significant savings. The partnership aims to enhance customer experience by offering access to these essential services at competitive rates. This initiative is expected to benefit a large number of Motive clients and improve their overall satisfaction with the company's offerings.

news.headline: WISeKey and The OISTE Foundation will launch the 'DeepTech for Peace Movement'. #technology #peace #collaboration
Sapio Sciences announces speaker lineup for SapioCon 2025 event in Fort Lauderdale. Event on February 26-28 aims to explore AI in research and diagnostics.
news.summary: Sapio Sciences, a lab informatics platform, revealed the speaker lineup and agenda for SapioCon 2025, scheduled for February 26-28, 2025, at Fort Lauderdale Marriott Harbor Beach Resort. The event aims to delve into the impact of AI and science-aware lab informatics on research, discovery, diagnostics, manufacturing, and business operations. This gathering will host prominent experts in the field to discuss these crucial topics.

news.headline: healthŌme and Hannover Re won the 2024 Global Innovation Award for genomics-based insurance program integrating genomics into critical illness coverage, enhancing the value of life and critical illness products.
news.summary: A prestigious award has been given to recognize the incorporation of genomics into coverage for critical illness, improving the efficacy of life and critical illness plans for both insurers and policyholders. This achievement was acknowledged in Huntsville, Alabama on December 10, 2024. healthŌme®, Inc., a top provider in precision health management through genomics, was honoured for their contribution to this field.

news.headline: GA Telesis opens new Latin America & Caribbean HQ in San Salvador, El Salvador; enhancing presence in the region.
news.summary: Announced on December 10, 2024, in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, GA Telesis, a prominent player in aviation lifecycle solutions, has opened its new Latin America & Caribbean headquarters in San Salvador, El Salvador. This move signifies the company's commitment to the Latin American market.

news.headline: Consumer drone market valued at USD 7.1 Billion in 2023, forecasted to hit USD 12.16 Billion by 2030, led by fixed-wing and rotary-wing drones.
news.summary: The consumer drone market, categorized by type into fixed wing and spiral wing, and by application into online and offline sales, is thriving in Bangalore, India. As of December 10, 2024, the global consumer drone market was valued at USD 7100 million in 2023. It is projected to grow significantly, with expectations to reach USD 12160 million by the year 2030.

news.headline: Humanetics Corporation receives $5 million from DOD to develop drug BIO 300 to prevent radiation injury.
news.summary: A Minneapolis-based company, Humanetics Corporation, has recently received an additional $5 million funding from the Department of Defense (DOD) as an addition to their existing Other Transaction Authority (OTA) for Prototype Agreement obtained in Fall 2023. The funding is intended to support the development of their drug, BIO 300, designed to mitigate bodily harm resulting from acute radiation exposure. Humanetics is currently working towards submitting a New Drug Application (NDA) for BIO 300, as part of their efforts to address this critical medical need.

news.headline: Microbot Medical® CEO Harel Gadot will talk about Endovascular Robotics on Benzinga All Access.
news.summary: According to recent reports, the total number of confirmed COVID-19 cases globally has surpassed 200 million, with over 4 million deaths reported. The United States has recorded the highest number of cases, exceeding 35 million, followed by India with over 31 million cases. The United States has also reported the highest number of deaths, with a toll of over 613,000. In terms of vaccination efforts, more than 4 billion doses have been administered worldwide. However, there are concerns regarding vaccine distribution inequalities, with lower-income countries facing challenges in securing an adequate supply of vaccines. This highlights the need for global cooperation in addressing the ongoing pandemic.

news.headline: Lightergy and LGQ to partner with Canon Marketing Japan to build energy storage system in Japan.
news.summary: Lightergy, a North American-based Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) company and its subsidiary, Lightning Grid Québec, have agreed to establish a cutting-edge energy storage and virtual power plant system in Japan. The agreement, announced on December 10, 2024, forms the foundation for the construction of this state-of-the-art system. This project will involve the deployment of advanced technology in the energy sector and is poised to significantly impact Japan’s energy landscape.

news.headline: Coalition of Palestinian private sector leaders propose transformative healthcare plan to address 40% of public deficit and double GDP by 2050.
news.summary: A coalition of 100 leaders from business, civil society, and policymakers has put forward a healthcare roadmap as a beacon of hope for post-conflict recovery. The proposal aims to not only stimulate and sustain recovery but also to double the GDP by the year 2050. The roadmap provides a long-term strategy and a stress-tested blueprint for health, with the participation of both Palestinian and international leaders.

news.headline: Bitlayer and Binance Wallet team up for BTCFI Carnival, will award $1.2M in BTR tokens.
news.summary: In Singapore on December 10, 2024, Bitlayer revealed a partnership with Binance Wallet to introduce the BTCFI Carnival event. This initiative, the first Bitcoin Layer 2 built on Bitcoin Finality, gives participants the opportunity to compete for a grand prize of $1.2 million in BTR. The event promises multiple exciting opportunities for engagement and reward.

news.headline: Pocketalk announces 2024 Global Impact Awards for language translation champions. PALO ALTO, Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: In Palo Alto, California, on December 10, 2024, honorees from various fields were recognized for their dedication to language translation. Pocketalk, a leader in AI-driven secure translation technology, proudly presented the second annual Pocketalk Impact Awards ceremony. This event celebrated individuals who have made significant contributions to language translation and community impact.

news.headline: Elite Rewards partners with Best Buy to offer top technology products for the holidays as part of their Employee Retention and Sales Incentive program.
news.summary: Elite Rewards has announced a new partnership with Best Buy to provide top technology products during the holiday season. The agreement, announced in Saint Petersburg, Fla on Dec. 10, 2024, allows Elite to offer a range of merchandise to participants of its Employee Retention and Sales Incentive programs. The collaboration will see Best Buy serving as the preferred vendor for Elite Rewards, ensuring access to a variety of high-quality tech products.

news.headline: High Income Securities Fund offered to buy up to 10,675,000 shares at 98% of NAV. 11,885,085 shares were tendered, with approx 90% accepted at $7.07/share.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, the High Income Securities Fund (NYSE: PCF) concluded its tender offer to acquire up to 10,675,000 shares for cash at 98% of the net asset value (NAV) per share. Following the expiration date, a total of 11,885,085 shares were validly tendered through the depository, Equiniti. Due to the oversubscription, approximately 90% of the shares tendered by each shareholder will be accepted for payment. The accepted shares will be purchased at $7.07 per share, which is equivalent to 98% of the NAV per common share amounting to $7.21.

news.headline: Fear and Greed Index 51/100 = Neutral
Concentro raises $3m to simplify clean energy financing by unlocking tax credit transfers for mid-sized projects.
news.summary: Concentro introduces a new service allowing mid-sized clean energy projects to benefit from tax credit transfers. This service enables developers to efficiently monetize transferable tax credits, reducing transaction costs and simplifying the process. Concentro's hands-on approach manages the entire process seamlessly, providing support from start to finish. This initiative aims to make it easier for developers to access financial benefits, with a focus on enhancing the efficiency and affordability of clean energy projects.

news.headline: Wasserstein launches Pixel 3-in-1 Charging Stand for Pixel products in Mountain View, Calif.
news.summary: A California-based company named Wasserstein recently unveiled its newest product, the Wasserstein 3-in-1 Charging Stand, on December 10, 2024. This stand comes with the coveted Google "Made for" badge and is specifically tailored for Pixel phones and Pixel Buds. Wasserstein is known for offering top-notch smart home accessories, and their latest offering aims to provide a convenient charging solution for users of Google's devices.

news.headline: Global pharmaceutical manufacturing equipment market to reach $26.94 billion by 2029, growing at a CAGR of 6.8% from 2024.
news.summary: A report has projected that the global market for pharmaceutical manufacturing equipment will increase from $19.41 billion in 2024 to $26.94 billion by 2029. This represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.8% during the forecast period.

news.headline: Inventor from Harrisburg, N.C. creates Swivel Seat attachment for chairs to rotate in any direction.(headers: InventHelp, Pittsburgh, Dec. 10, 2024)(numbers: Not provided)
news.summary: A resident from Harrisburg, N.C. recently invented the SWIVEL SEAT to provide a convenient solution for rotating in any chair. The innovative design allows users to easily turn their chair in various directions for optimal viewing of the television, better interaction with another individual, or to enjoy the view from a window. The product aims to enhance comfort and flexibility in seating arrangements. The invention is expected to revolutionize the way people experience seating comfort and is set to enter the market in the coming months.

news.headline: Renters fear scams in tight housing market, 93% think scams are common, 90% worried about falling victim according to Rently survey.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, renters are facing increasing challenges in the competitive housing market due to a rise in sophisticated rental scams. A survey conducted by Rently revealed that 93% of renters consider scams to be a common occurrence, with 90% expressing concerns about becoming victims themselves. The 2024 Rently Survey: Rental Scams and Fraud Report, carried out by Pollfish, highlights the need for industry-wide measures to address this growing issue.

news.headline: Duolingo and Netflix collaborate for 'Learn Korean or Else' campaign before Squid Game S2; Duo the Owl & Pink Guard lead fans.
news.summary: A new addition to the Pink Guard has been made with the arrival of Duo the Owl, who will be teaming up with the group to engage fans in various challenges. This partnership brings excitement as Duo the Owl joins the Pink Guard in their fan interactions. The Pink Guard now stands strengthened with this collaboration, ready to take on challenges and engage with their audience. Stay tuned to see how this new development adds a fun and engaging element to the fan experience.

news.headline: IBM introduces co-packaged optics for data centers, boosting speed and energy efficiency for AI, computing apps.
news.summary: In a recent development, IBM has introduced a groundbreaking co-packaged optics technology that has the potential to supplant electrical interconnects within data centers. This innovation, presented in Yorktown Heights, New York on December 10, 2024, aims to deliver substantial enhancements in speed and energy efficiency for various computing tasks, particularly beneficial for AI applications. With IBM (NYSE: IBM) at the forefront, this advancement marks a significant step towards transformative improvements in data center operations.

news.headline: Gran Tierra Energy Inc. priced $150 million of 9.500% Senior Secured Amortizing Notes due 2029 in private placement.
news.summary: Gran Tierra Energy Inc. revealed the pricing of an additional $150 million aggregate principal amount for its previously issued 9.500% Senior Secured Amortizing Notes due 2029. The offering was made to qualified institutional buyers in the United States under Rule 144A of the Securities Act of 1933, as well as to non-U.S. persons outside the U.S. under Regulation S of the Securities Act, and through specific prospectus exemptions in Canada. The company's stock is listed on multiple exchanges, including NYSE American, TSX, and LSE.

news.headline: Global Jet Capital raises $617M with 8th ABS offering, totaling $5.8B assets securitized and $4.8B bonds issued.
news.summary: On September 17, 2024, in Danbury, CT, Global Jet Capital, a prominent provider of financial services for business aircraft, revealed the finalization of its BJETS 2024-2 securitization. This initiative gathered around $617 million, marking Global Jet Capital's eighth asset-backed security (ABS) endeavor. Overall, the organization has now secured close to $5.8 billion in assets and issued about $4.8 billion in bonds.

news.headline: Local bank to become region's biggest with upcoming merger.
Hepsiburada announces second issuance of asset-backed securities worth TRY 350 million on Sept. 30, 2024.
news.summary: Today, a prominent Turkish e-commerce platform, D-MARKET Electronic Services & Trading known as "Hepsiburada," revealed the launch of its second asset-backed securities totaling TRY 350 million. The announcement was made in Istanbul on Sept. 30, 2024.

news.headline: Eterna Therapeutics finalizes financial restructuring to boost developmental activities for long-term success.
news.summary: Eterna Therapeutics has successfully finalized a strategic financial restructuring process to enhance its developmental endeavors and ensure long-term prosperity. This move aims to propel the company's growth and innovation, positioning it for success in the future. With this restructuring, Eterna Therapeutics looks to leverage its resources more effectively and efficiently to drive its activities forward. This strategic financial realignment will play a crucial role in shaping the company's trajectory, and underscores its commitment to creating a sustainable and impactful presence in the industry.

news.headline: Azerion files for EUR 50 million bond issuance on Nasdaq Stockholm, excluding distribution in US or restricted jurisdictions.
news.summary: This document is not intended for distribution to any individual in the United States or to any U.S. person, as defined in Regulation S under the U.S. Securities Act of 1933, or in any jurisdiction where such distribution is unlawful.

news.headline: NowCM and White & Case set up a digital, fully automated commercial paper program for Haniel - a global first.
Trump selects Rep. Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Labor Secretary after endorsements from unions. Lost bid for 2nd term narrowly.
news.summary: A politician from a swing district, she gained support from multiple unions but narrowly missed securing a second term in the House of Representatives.

news.headline: Matinas BioPharma terminates MAT2203 partnership negotiations, leading to an 80% workforce reduction with 15 positions cut.
news.summary: In Bedminster, New Jersey on October 31, 2024, Matinas BioPharma Holdings, Inc. revealed the end of negotiations for global rights to MAT2203, an oral amphotericin B formulation, after the potential partner's withdrawal. Consequently, Matinas has initiated an immediate 80% reduction in workforce, cutting 15 positions, including three senior management roles. Furthermore, all product development efforts have been halted to preserve funds.

news.headline: Trump is known for exempting preferred firms from tariffs. Companies are seeking to sway him as they await his decisions.
news.summary: Donald Trump has a history of pardoning favored companies from tariffs, with reports showing an increase in companies vying to sway his decisions. This trend is exemplified by the number of companies seeking forgiveness, which has risen sharply in recent months. Trump's penchant for granting reprieves from tariffs has created an environment where businesses are eager to lobby for their own exemptions. The growing number of companies seeking clemency underscores the influence Trump wields in this domain.

news.headline: Guggenheim anticipates mixed effects of Fed rate cuts on high yield bonds in Q4 2024.
news.summary: The impact of interest rate reductions on high yield bonds could yield varying results. This can be attributed to the fluctuating nature of high yield bond performance in light of interest rate adjustments. The relationship between rate cuts and high yield bonds is complex, with outcomes ranging from potential profit gains to risks of increased default rates. Investors should be mindful of these dynamics as they consider the implications of rate cuts on high yield bonds.

news.headline: Verve Therapeutics grants equity awards to one new employee on November 29, 2024, under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
news.summary: On November 29, 2024, Verve Therapeutics in Boston revealed that they provided equity awards to one fresh staff member under the 2024 Inducement Stock Incentive Plan. This move was crucial in persuading the new employee to join the company and aligns with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Verve Therapeutics focuses on developing a new category of genetic medications for cardiovascular disease and is currently in the clinical stage.

news.headline: Brookfield plans corporate structure changes for shareholder ownership, vote on Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: BAM shareholders will cast their votes during a special meeting scheduled for December 20, 2024. The shareholders will convene on this date to make crucial decisions regarding the company's future. This meeting will play a significant role in determining the direction of BAM, with important resolutions and proposals set to be discussed and voted upon. It marks a pivotal moment for the company as stakeholders come together to exercise their voting rights and shape the path forward.

news.headline: Pineapple Energy shareholders approve name change to SUNation Energy, Inc. and move to Delaware incorporation.
news.summary: Pineapple Energy has revealed a significant update, indicating a shift in its corporate identity to SUNation Energy, Inc. Additionally, the company has altered its official state of incorporation to Delaware. This decision marks an important transition for the company, signifying a new chapter in its operations and growth prospects.
